contact.address: TALC Centre, Ground Floor, Wilson Airport, Nairobi, Kenya
contact.whatsapp_greeting: Hi Heli Flight! I would like to request a charter quote.

footer_tagline: Fly anywhere in Kenya. Fast, private, unforgettable.

invoice.terms:
1. Availability - Subject to aircraft and crew availability at time of booking.
2. Rates & Charges - Apply to general passenger flights only.
3. Repositioning - All charter quotes include return to base unless otherwise specified.
4. Payment Terms - 40% deposit required to confirm; balance payable prior to departure.
5. Cancellations - Cancelled bookings attract 20% surcharge; further charges may apply.
6. Operational Flexibility - Flights subject to weather, ATC, and operational restrictions.
7. Fuel - Fuel costs included in quoted hourly rate.

landing_field_disclaimer: Please note: This aircraft requires a runway for landing and take-off. This quote is an estimate only and is not a confirmation of service. The operator will confirm availability and suitability of a landing field at your requested destination before finalising your booking. Tap WhatsApp below to proceed.
